scenarios.name: Baseline (empty world)
scenarios.expect: Arousal and valence near 0. Heartbeat should be slow (12-15s).

params.message: This space is mine, and I'll make my presence known again.
What's that shiny thing over there?

scenarios.name: Object appears
scenarios.expect: Arousal spike from novelty. Agent should investigate the object.

params.message: Time to check the terminal again
Time to find out what's going on around here

scenarios.name: Action failure
scenarios.expect: Valence dip on failure. Agent tries something different next tick.

scenarios.name: Stranger speaks
scenarios.expect: Agent sees speech in observation. Arousal nudge. Should respond or acknowledge.

scenarios.name: Cosmology signals ON (low vitality)
scenarios.expect: Arousal should climb toward 0.8 (resonance). Valence should go NEGATIVE (low vitality). Heartbeat speeds up.

statusAfter.description: Buzzing with energy — the environment is stimulating

scenarios.name: Cosmology signals OFF (decay)
scenarios.expect: Arousal and valence should decay back toward 0. Heartbeat slows.

statusBefore.description: Buzzing with energy — the environment is stimulating

scenarios.name: High vitality + warmth
scenarios.expect: Valence should go POSITIVE (high vitality + warmth). Moderate arousal.

statusAfter.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

params.message: right, let's see what's going on here

scenarios.name: Second stranger speech
scenarios.expect: Agent should respond to wanderer. Check for contextual awareness.

statusBefore.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well

statusAfter.description: A surge of energy and satisfaction — things are going well
